name: dispatcher
author: rSwitch Core Team
description: Core packet dispatcher using tail calls to route packets through the processing pipeline
full_description: Primary ingress entrypoint that initializes packet context, performs base parsing, and jumps into the configured ingress module chain.
usage_example: ingress: [dispatcher, vlan, acl, route, l2learn, lastcall]

name: lacp
author: rSwitch Core Team
description: LACP control-plane packet handling for bonded interfaces
full_description: Processes Link Aggregation Control Protocol traffic and exposes state for link-bundle decisions in mixed dataplane/control workflows.

name: lldp
author: rSwitch Core Team
description: LLDP frame processing for topology discovery
full_description: Handles Link Layer Discovery Protocol packets for inventory, adjacency, and operational visibility use cases.

name: stp
author: rSwitch Core Team
description: Spanning Tree Protocol guardrails for loop prevention
full_description: Applies STP-aware policy checks to BPDUs and forwarding behavior to prevent L2 loops in bridged topologies.

name: tunnel
author: rSwitch Core Team
description: Tunnel encapsulation/decapsulation for overlay networking
full_description: Provides overlay networking primitives and metadata propagation for tunnel endpoints in programmable network fabrics.

name: source_guard
author: rSwitch Core Team
description: IP/MAC source validation to prevent spoofing
full_description: Validates source bindings to block endpoint spoofing and unauthorized lateral movement at the network edge.

name: dhcp_snoop
author: rSwitch Core Team
description: DHCP snooping and lease-based trust enforcement
full_description: Observes DHCP transactions to build trusted endpoint state used by security controls such as source guard.

name: vlan
author: rSwitch Core Team
description: VLAN ingress classification and policy enforcement
full_description: Classifies tagged and untagged traffic, enforces VLAN membership, and sets per-packet VLAN context for downstream modules.

name: qos_classify
author: rSwitch Core Team
description: Ingress QoS classification by DSCP/port/protocol
full_description: Assigns traffic classes and priorities early in the pipeline so scheduling and policy modules can apply differentiated treatment.

name: rate_limiter
author: rSwitch Core Team
description: Token-bucket style ingress rate limiting
full_description: Applies per-flow or per-class rate policy to smooth bursts and protect downstream resources.

name: acl
author: rSwitch Core Team
description: Access control list filtering for L2/L3/L4 policy
full_description: Performs stateless packet filtering with match-action rules for segmentation, firewalling, and compliance use cases.

name: conntrack
author: rSwitch Core Team
description: Stateful connection tracking for flows
full_description: Tracks transport sessions and flow state for policy modules that require packet-direction awareness.

name: mirror
author: rSwitch Core Team
description: Traffic mirroring for SPAN-style observability
full_description: Replicates selected traffic to monitoring destinations without interrupting forwarding behavior.

name: route
author: rSwitch Core Team
description: IPv4 LPM routing with next-hop resolution
full_description: Performs longest-prefix route lookup, decrements TTL, rewrites L2 headers, and selects egress interface for routed traffic.

name: nat
author: rSwitch Core Team
description: Network address translation for IPv4 flows
full_description: Supports source and destination address translation scenarios for edge routing, service publication, and policy isolation.

name: flow_table
author: rSwitch Core Team
description: Flow cache acceleration for established traffic
full_description: Caches match-action decisions for active flows to reduce repeated policy and lookup cost in steady-state traffic.

name: l2learn
author: rSwitch Core Team
description: MAC learning and forwarding table updates
full_description: Learns source MAC-to-port mappings and assists bridge forwarding decisions for unknown or dynamic L2 destinations.

name: sflow
author: rSwitch Core Team
description: Sampled flow telemetry export for analytics
full_description: Collects packet samples and metadata for external telemetry pipelines and network analytics platforms.

name: lastcall
author: rSwitch Core Team
description: Final ingress forwarding decision and redirect
full_description: Terminal ingress module that executes the final redirect/pass/drop behavior after upstream policy and lookup modules complete.
usage_example: ingress: [dispatcher, vlan, acl, route, l2learn, lastcall]

name: egress
author: rSwitch Core Team
description: Core devmap egress hook and pipeline entry
full_description: Devmap-attached egress entrypoint that updates TX stats and launches the configured egress module chain.

name: egress_qos
author: rSwitch Core Team
description: Egress QoS enforcement and marking
full_description: Applies outbound policy such as queue selection, priority treatment, and marking before transmission.

name: egress_vlan
author: rSwitch Core Team
description: Egress VLAN tag add/remove and isolation checks
full_description: Performs outbound VLAN tag operations and enforces per-port VLAN transmission policy on redirected packets.

name: egress_final
author: rSwitch Core Team
description: Final egress stage for cleanup and pass
full_description: Terminal egress module that finalizes packet context and returns pass semantics for physical transmit.
